# B-05, V-12
# Plan PR Template

## Scope
<!-- Which agent scope does this change belong to? (backend/frontend/db) -->

## Ticket / Issue
<!-- Link to the GitHub issue this PR addresses -->

## Risk Level
<!-- Low / Medium / High / Critical — determined from risk-classification.yml -->

## Success Criteria
<!-- What must be true for this change to be considered complete? -->

## Files to Modify
<!-- List all files that will be changed, with brief description of each change -->

## Plan
<!-- Detailed description of the approach, including any design decisions -->

## Rollback Strategy
<!-- How will changes be reversed if something goes wrong? -->

## Escalation Path
<!-- Who should be contacted if this plan cannot be executed as described? -->

## Evidence
<!-- CI check results, test outputs, validation reports will be attached -->
